clinical_role: Benchmark molecule. Emerging neonatal neuroprotection research in HIE.
what_happens_without: No calibration baseline for simulation accuracy.

clinical_role: Quantum chemistry calibration standard.
what_happens_without: No ground truth for simulation validation.

clinical_role: Solvent for all IV preparations and hydration.
what_happens_without: Dehydration. Death.

clinical_role: Aerobic respiration. Fetal oxygenation. Neonatal resuscitation.
what_happens_without: Hypoxia. Brain damage in minutes. Death.
access_barrier: Concentrators cost $1000+. 50% Sub-Saharan hospitals lack O2.

clinical_role: Cylinder diluent for iNO. Haber-Bosch feedstock for N-containing drugs.
what_happens_without: No iNO delivery. No nitrogen chemistry.

clinical_role: Precursor to all N-containing pharmaceuticals via Haber-Bosch.
what_happens_without: No antibiotics, no amino acids. Civilization collapses.

clinical_role: H2 feedstock via SMR for Haber-Bosch. Breath biomarker for gut microbiome.
what_happens_without: No hydrogen for nitrogen chemistry.

clinical_role: Pulmonary vasodilator for PPHN. ~15,000 deaths/year. Public domain molecule.
what_happens_without: PPHN death. Patent on electronic delivery device (Mallinckrodt).
access_barrier: Patent on hardware, not molecule. Venturi bypass in chemopedia.

clinical_role: Blood gas monitoring guides every NICU ventilator decision.
what_happens_without: Blind ventilator management. IVH and ischemia risk.

clinical_role: VHP sterilization of incubators. BPD biomarker in exhaled breath.
what_happens_without: HAIs kill 75,000+ neonates/year.

clinical_role: Maintains uterine lining. Prevents miscarriage. Supplemented in high-risk pregnancies.
what_happens_without: Luteal phase deficiency -> spontaneous abortion. 10-15% of pregnancies fail.
access_barrier: Generic. Underused in LMIC threatened-miscarriage protocols.

clinical_role: Primary estrogen. Drives endometrial growth, placental vascularization.
what_happens_without: Failed implantation. Inadequate placental development.

clinical_role: Prevents 70% of neural tube defects (spina bifida, anencephaly).
what_happens_without: 300,000 NTD cases/year globally. Spina bifida, anencephaly, encephalocele.
access_barrier: Available but not supplemented in 50+ countries. WHO EML.

clinical_role: Hemoglobin synthesis, oxygen transport, fetal iron loading.
what_happens_without: Maternal anemia -> preterm birth, low birth weight. 40% of pregnancies.
access_barrier: Available. GI side effects limit compliance.

clinical_role: Active Vitamin A form. Directs limb patterning, organ morphogenesis, lung development.
what_happens_without: Congenital malformations. Impaired lung epithelial differentiation.
access_barrier: Teratogenic at high doses. Dosing critical.

clinical_role: Skeletal mineralization, cardiac function, preeclampsia prevention.
what_happens_without: Neonatal hypocalcemia, rickets. <30% WHO guideline compliance in SSA.

clinical_role: DNA synthesis, immune function. Deficiency causes growth retardation.
what_happens_without: IUGR, immune deficiency, infection susceptibility.
access_barrier: Cheap. WHO-recommended. Underused in prenatal care.

clinical_role: Docosahexaenoic acid. Brain myelination, retinal development.
what_happens_without: Impaired neurodevelopment. Reduced cognitive outcomes in preterm infants.

clinical_role: T4 thyroid hormone. CNS development. Maternal T4 crosses placenta until week 20.
what_happens_without: Congenital hypothyroidism -> cretinism if untreated. Mandatory newborn screen.
access_barrier: Generic levothyroxine. Screening is the barrier in LMICs.

clinical_role: Antenatal steroid. Reduces RDS 34%, death 25%, IVH 50%. WHO EML. $0.20/course saves 500k lives/year.
what_happens_without: RDS. Leading cause of neonatal death in preterm. 1M deaths/year.
access_barrier: 10% coverage in LMICs where 99% of deaths occur.

clinical_role: Antenatal neuroprotectant. Reduces CP 30-40% (BEAM trial). NMDA antagonist.
what_happens_without: Excitotoxic brain injury in preterm birth.
access_barrier: WHO EML. Protocol adoption is the barrier.

clinical_role: N-methylacetamide — peptide bond mimic for SP-B surfactant protein. SP-B required for alveolar stability.
what_happens_without: Lung collapse at end-expiration. RDS kills ~1M preterm neonates/year.

clinical_role: Silver nanoparticle antimicrobial. CLABSI reduction 30-50% on coated CVCs.
what_happens_without: 75,000+ neonatal HAI deaths/year.

clinical_role: BUN marker for renal function. Neonatal AKI affects 20-30% of critically ill neonates.
what_happens_without: Undetected AKI. Wrong drug dosing. Organ failure.

clinical_role: PLGA drug delivery co-monomer. Sustained-release eliminates repeated IV access.
what_happens_without: Repeated IV access -> CLABSI risk.

clinical_role: Simplest amino acid, essential in neonatal TPN for protein synthesis.
what_happens_without: Hypoproteinemia and growth failure within days.

clinical_role: PLA nanoparticle monomer. 100-300nm optimal for pulmonary drug delivery in RDS.
what_happens_without: Continuous infusion required instead of once-daily dosing.

clinical_role: L-Alanine in neonatal TPN. Feeds gluconeogenesis in immature neonatal liver.
what_happens_without: Hypoglycemia in preterm/SGA infants who lack glycogen stores.

clinical_role: Serum creatinine: primary neonatal renal function marker.
what_happens_without: Undetected AKI. Wrong vancomycin/aminoglycoside dosing.

clinical_role: Most abundant free amino acid in neonatal brain/retina. Cannot synthesize before 34wk.
what_happens_without: Auditory brainstem abnormalities, retinal degeneration, neurodevelopmental delay.

clinical_role: Emergency IV correction of metabolic acidosis in preterm infants.
what_happens_without: Uncorrected acidosis -> cardiac dysfunction, organ failure.

clinical_role: Antifungal. Prophylaxis reduces invasive candidiasis 75-90% in VLBW.
what_happens_without: Candida: 3rd most common late-onset sepsis, 20-30% mortality.

clinical_role: Benzodiazepine for NICU sedation and second-line neonatal seizures.
what_happens_without: Inadequate sedation during ventilation. Uncontrolled seizures.

clinical_role: PDE3 inhibitor for low cardiac output post-surgery, refractory PPHN.
what_happens_without: Cardiac failure post-surgery. No fallback after dopamine/dobutamine fail.

clinical_role: Loop diuretic. Used in >80% of premature infants for pulmonary edema, BPD.
what_happens_without: Pulmonary edema. Fluid overload.
access_barrier: None. Workhorse of NICU fluid management.

clinical_role: Excitotoxic target. During HIE: glutamate flood -> NMDA -> Ca2+ -> neuronal death.
what_happens_without: HIE: leading cause of neonatal death + permanent disability. 1-4/1000 births.

clinical_role: Antioxidant reduces BPD and ROP. Required for collagen/alveolar wall development.
what_happens_without: BPD, ROP — permanent lung damage and blindness.

clinical_role: Drug for neonatal cardiac arrest. NRP 2020: IV epinephrine if HR<60 after compressions.
what_happens_without: Neonatal cardiac arrest -> death.

clinical_role: First-line anticonvulsant for neonatal seizures. WHO EML. Since 1903.
what_happens_without: Untreated seizures -> cytotoxic edema, permanent brain damage.

clinical_role: Primary opioid for ventilated infants, post-surgical, NAS withdrawal.
what_happens_without: Uncontrolled neonatal pain. Increased IVH risk (NEOPAIN trial).

clinical_role: Jaundice biomarker. >20 mg/dL -> kernicterus: permanent basal ganglia damage or death.
what_happens_without: Kernicterus. Preventable death in LMICs today.

clinical_role: PEGylation extends biologic half-life 2-10x. Fewer doses, less IV, less infection.
what_happens_without: Rapid renal clearance of biologics. More IV access needed.

clinical_role: Primary fatty acid of DPPC lung surfactant. DPPC = 40% of surfactant lipid.
what_happens_without: Alveolar collapse without DPPC. RDS.

clinical_role: Adrenal insufficiency (~50% VLBW) and refractory hypotension. PREMILOC trial.
what_happens_without: Vascular collapse when dopamine/dobutamine fail.

clinical_role: Keeps ductus arteriosus open in cyanotic CHD. Bridge to operating room.
what_happens_without: Death within 24-48hr in ductal-dependent CHD (HLHS, pulmonary atresia).
access_barrier: Cold chain. Reconstitute just before use.

clinical_role: IM supplementation reduces BPD 15-26% in ELBW (Tyson 1999 NEJM). Reduces all-cause mortality 15%.
what_happens_without: BPD. Impaired lung epithelial repair.

clinical_role: PDE5 inhibitor for PPHN when iNO unavailable. Same cGMP pathway.
what_happens_without: No fallback when iNO delivery unavailable. PPHN death.

clinical_role: Universal newborn eye prophylaxis. Prokinetic for neonatal gastroparesis.
what_happens_without: Ophthalmia neonatorum -> blindness from N. gonorrhoeae.

clinical_role: Last-resort for MRSA/CoNS sepsis. Dominant late-onset NICU pathogen.
what_happens_without: MRSA bacteremia: 15-30% mortality without treatment.

clinical_role: Visible-light antimicrobial. Band gap 2.0 eV. Ambient lighting sterilizes continuously.
what_happens_without: HAIs without UV/chemical sterilization. 75k+ neonatal deaths/year.

clinical_role: UV photocatalyst. Hydroxyl radicals destroy bacteria, RSV, VOCs on contact.
what_happens_without: NICU air contamination.

clinical_role: Dominant lung surfactant lipid (~40%). Reduces alveolar surface tension to prevent collapse.
what_happens_without: Alveolar collapse. RDS. 1M preterm deaths/year.

clinical_role: Anionic surfactant lipid. 7-15% of lung surfactant. Required for SP-B interaction.
what_happens_without: Impaired surfactant spreading. Reduced SP-B function.

clinical_role: Core phospholipid headgroup. Template for all PC surfactant variants.
what_happens_without: No phospholipid membrane integrity.

clinical_role: Membrane fluidity regulator. 5-8% of surfactant lipid. Modulates surface tension.
what_happens_without: Membrane rigidity. Impaired surfactant function at body temperature.

clinical_role: SP-C aids surfactant lipid insertion into air-liquid interface. Hydrophobic transmembrane.
what_happens_without: Reduced surfactant adsorption rate. Higher work of breathing.

clinical_role: Curosurf active lipid. Porcine-derived natural surfactant standard of care.
what_happens_without: RDS mortality without surfactant replacement.

clinical_role: Survanta active lipid. Bovine-derived surfactant.
what_happens_without: RDS mortality.

clinical_role: First-line for apnea of prematurity. Reduces BPD (CAP trial). WHO EML.
what_happens_without: Apnea episodes -> hypoxia -> brain damage. BPD.

clinical_role: First-line for early-onset neonatal sepsis (with gentamicin). Covers GBS, E.coli, Listeria.
what_happens_without: Untreated sepsis: 30-50% mortality in VLBW.

clinical_role: Aminoglycoside. First-line with ampicillin for early-onset sepsis. Synergistic GBS kill.
what_happens_without: Inadequate synergistic coverage. GBS breakthrough.

clinical_role: Antiviral for neonatal HSV. Without treatment: 80% mortality in disseminated HSV.
what_happens_without: Neonatal HSV encephalitis. Death or permanent disability.

clinical_role: Carbapenem. Broad-spectrum for ESBL-producing gram-negatives. Last-line for resistant sepsis.
what_happens_without: MDR gram-negative sepsis: near 100% mortality without effective antibiotic.

clinical_role: Third-gen cephalosporin. Meningitis coverage. Crosses BBB.
what_happens_without: Neonatal meningitis: 20-50% mortality, 30% disability in survivors.

clinical_role: Anaerobic coverage. NEC surgical prophylaxis. Covers B. fragilis.
what_happens_without: Anaerobic peritonitis in NEC.

clinical_role: Topical/oral antifungal prophylaxis. Alternative to fluconazole.
what_happens_without: Mucosal candidiasis progressing to invasive disease.

clinical_role: Echinocandin. Salvage therapy for fluconazole-resistant Candida.
what_happens_without: Resistant invasive candidiasis: >40% mortality.

clinical_role: Narrow-spectrum. Congenital syphilis treatment. GBS prophylaxis intrapartum.
what_happens_without: Congenital syphilis: multiorgan failure, stillbirth.

clinical_role: Aminoglycoside. Alternative to gentamicin. Preferred for Pseudomonas.
what_happens_without: Pseudomonas NICU outbreaks.

clinical_role: MRSA alternative when vancomycin unavailable. Covers inducible resistance.
what_happens_without: MRSA soft tissue infections in neonates.

clinical_role: Kills biofilm-embedded staphylococci. Congenital TB. Device-related infections.
what_happens_without: Biofilm infections on CVCs. Congenital TB: fatal if untreated.

clinical_role: Antiviral for congenital CMV. Prevents hearing loss progression.
what_happens_without: CMV: leading infectious cause of sensorineural hearing loss and neurodisability.

clinical_role: Skin antiseptic. Cord care reduces omphalitis and neonatal mortality 12% in community settings.
what_happens_without: Cord infections -> neonatal sepsis in LMICs.

clinical_role: COX inhibitor. First-line IV for PDA closure in preterm infants.
what_happens_without: Hemodynamically significant PDA -> heart failure, pulmonary hemorrhage.

clinical_role: Alternative COX inhibitor for PDA. Fewer renal side effects than indomethacin.
what_happens_without: PDA in ELBW -> volume overload, BPD.

clinical_role: Emerging PDA closure agent. Also neonatal pain management (non-opioid).
what_happens_without: No non-opioid pain option. Surgical PDA ligation.

clinical_role: Second-line anticonvulsant. NEOLEV2 trial. Better side-effect profile than phenobarbital.
what_happens_without: Refractory neonatal seizures after phenobarbital.

clinical_role: Third-line anticonvulsant for refractory neonatal seizures. IV infusion.
what_happens_without: Status epilepticus refractory to phenobarbital + midazolam.

clinical_role: AMPA/kainate antagonist. Adjunctive neuroprotection in HIE under investigation.
what_happens_without: Excitotoxic brain injury in HIE. No proven adjunct to cooling.

clinical_role: NKCC1 inhibitor. Targets neonatal chloride gradient that makes GABA excitatory.
what_happens_without: Neonatal seizure pharmacology differs from adult — GABA is excitatory in neonates.

clinical_role: Neuroprotective cytokine. HEAL trial. Reduces white matter injury in HIE.
what_happens_without: No neuroprotection beyond therapeutic hypothermia.

clinical_role: Low-affinity NMDA antagonist. Neonatal neuroprotection research.
what_happens_without: Excitotoxic injury pathway. No selective neonatal NMDA antagonist exists.
access_barrier: Adult dosing only. Neonatal PK unknown.

clinical_role: First-line vasopressor for neonatal hypotension. Dose-dependent receptor selectivity.
what_happens_without: Refractory hypotension -> organ hypoperfusion -> NEC, IVH.

clinical_role: Beta-1 selective inotrope. Low cardiac output syndrome.
what_happens_without: Cardiac failure post-surgery when dopamine fails.

clinical_role: Alpha-1 agonist. Refractory vasodilatory shock. Increasing use in neonatal septic shock.
what_happens_without: Vasodilatory shock unresponsive to dopamine.

clinical_role: V1 receptor agonist. Catecholamine-resistant shock rescue.
what_happens_without: Refractory septic shock after dopamine + norepinephrine fail.

clinical_role: SVT termination. Brief half-life (10s). Safe in neonates.
what_happens_without: Sustained SVT -> cardiac failure in neonates.

clinical_role: Heart failure and SVT maintenance. Narrow therapeutic index in neonates.
what_happens_without: Recurrent SVT. Chronic heart failure.

clinical_role: Anticholinergic. Bradycardia during intubation. Organophosphate antidote.
what_happens_without: Vagal bradycardia during procedures.

clinical_role: CVAD patency. Neonatal thrombosis treatment. UFH preferred over LMWH for reversibility.
what_happens_without: Catheter thrombosis. Neonatal stroke.

clinical_role: Essential BCAA. Protein synthesis activator via mTOR. Critical for preterm growth.
what_happens_without: Growth failure. Catabolism.

clinical_role: Essential BCAA. Gluconeogenesis substrate in neonatal fasting.
what_happens_without: BCAA deficiency. Failure to thrive.

clinical_role: Essential BCAA. Glucogenic amino acid.
what_happens_without: BCAA deficiency. Catabolism.

clinical_role: Essential amino acid. Collagen synthesis. Carnitine precursor.
what_happens_without: Impaired connective tissue. Carnitine deficiency.

clinical_role: Essential amino acid. Methyl donor via SAM. Cysteine precursor.
what_happens_without: Methylation failure. Homocysteinemia.

clinical_role: Essential amino acid. PKU screen: elevated Phe -> intellectual disability if untreated.
what_happens_without: PKU: irreversible neurodevelopmental damage without early diet.

clinical_role: Essential amino acid. Mucin synthesis for gut barrier.
what_happens_without: Gut barrier deficiency -> NEC susceptibility.

clinical_role: Essential amino acid. Serotonin and melatonin precursor. Niacin synthesis.
what_happens_without: Serotonin deficiency. Sleep-wake cycle disruption.

clinical_role: Conditionally essential in neonates. Histamine precursor. Metal ion binding.
what_happens_without: Growth restriction. Impaired immune function.

clinical_role: NO precursor via eNOS. Arginine supplementation reduces NEC incidence (Amin 2002 J Ped).
what_happens_without: NEC: 5-10% VLBW. 20-30% mortality.

clinical_role: Conditionally essential in preterm (immature cystathionase). Glutathione precursor.
what_happens_without: Glutathione depletion. Oxidative stress. ROP and BPD.

clinical_role: Conditionally essential. Enterocyte fuel. Gut barrier integrity.
what_happens_without: Gut mucosal atrophy. NEC susceptibility.

clinical_role: Collagen synthesis. Conditionally essential in neonates.
what_happens_without: Impaired wound healing. Connective tissue defects.

clinical_role: Phosphatidylserine precursor. Sphingolipid synthesis for myelination.
what_happens_without: Impaired myelination.

clinical_role: Conditionally essential in preterm (immature PAH). Dopamine/thyroxine precursor.
what_happens_without: Tyrosinemia of prematurity. Catecholamine deficiency.

clinical_role: Urea cycle intermediate. Purine synthesis.
what_happens_without: Urea cycle disruption.

clinical_role: Protein synthesis. CNS amino acid.
what_happens_without: Asparagine synthetase deficiency: severe encephalopathy.

clinical_role: Fatty acid transport into mitochondria. Preterm infants cannot synthesize adequate carnitine.
what_happens_without: Carnitine deficiency -> hypoketotic hypoglycemia, cardiomyopathy.

clinical_role: IM injection prevents vitamin K deficiency bleeding (VKDB). 100% preventable.
what_happens_without: VKDB: intracranial hemorrhage, GI bleeding. Fatal untreated.
access_barrier: None. Parental refusal is the barrier.

clinical_role: Calcium absorption. Bone mineralization. 400 IU/day for all infants (AAP).
what_happens_without: Rickets. Osteopenia of prematurity.

clinical_role: Lipid-soluble antioxidant. Reduces ROP severity in VLBW.
what_happens_without: Oxidative hemolysis. ROP.

clinical_role: Pyruvate dehydrogenase cofactor. Wernicke-like encephalopathy described in neonates.
what_happens_without: Lactic acidosis. Encephalopathy.

clinical_role: FAD/FMN cofactor. Phototherapy depletes riboflavin rapidly.
what_happens_without: Riboflavin depletion during phototherapy.

clinical_role: GABA synthesis cofactor. Pyridoxine-dependent seizures: trial of B6 before phenobarbital.
what_happens_without: Pyridoxine-dependent epilepsy: refractory seizures.

clinical_role: Methylcobalamin for folate metabolism. B12 deficiency: megaloblastic anemia, neurodegeneration.
what_happens_without: Megaloblastic anemia. Subacute combined degeneration.

clinical_role: Carboxylase cofactor. Biotinidase deficiency: neonatal screening target.
what_happens_without: Seizures, alopecia, metabolic acidosis from biotinidase deficiency.

clinical_role: NAD+/NADP+ precursor. Pellagra prevention. Tryptophan conversion.
what_happens_without: NAD depletion. Energy metabolism failure.

clinical_role: CoA precursor. Fatty acid synthesis and oxidation.
what_happens_without: CoA depletion. Energy metabolism disruption.

clinical_role: Essential electrolyte. Hypokalemia common with furosemide use.
what_happens_without: Cardiac arrhythmia. Ileus.

clinical_role: Normal saline. Volume expansion. Electrolyte correction.
what_happens_without: Hyponatremia. Seizures.

clinical_role: IV calcium for neonatal hypocalcemia. Safer than CaCl2 via peripheral line.
what_happens_without: Hypocalcemic seizures. QT prolongation.

clinical_role: TPN magnesium source. Hypomagnesemia with aminoglycosides.
what_happens_without: Refractory hypokalemia (Mg required for K retention).

clinical_role: TPN phosphorus source. Prevents metabolic bone disease.
what_happens_without: Osteopenia of prematurity. Fractures.

clinical_role: Oral iron supplementation from 2 weeks in preterm infants. Prevents anemia.
what_happens_without: Iron deficiency anemia. Neurodevelopmental delay.

clinical_role: TPN zinc source. Zinc critical for immune function and growth.
what_happens_without: Acrodermatitis. Immune deficiency.

clinical_role: TPN copper source. Ceruloplasmin synthesis for iron metabolism.
what_happens_without: Copper deficiency: anemia, neutropenia, osteoporosis.

clinical_role: TPN manganese source. SOD cofactor.
what_happens_without: Mn deficiency rare; Mn toxicity in cholestasis -> basal ganglia damage.

clinical_role: IV dextrose: emergency hypoglycemia treatment. D10W standard for neonates.
what_happens_without: Neonatal hypoglycemia -> seizures -> brain damage. Immediate threat.

clinical_role: Hyperglycemia management in ELBW. Continuous insulin infusion.
what_happens_without: Hyperglycemia -> osmotic diuresis, IVH risk, infection.

clinical_role: Ammonia scavenger for urea cycle disorders. Emergency hyperammonemia treatment.
what_happens_without: Hyperammonemia: lethal within hours in neonates.

clinical_role: Ammonia scavenger. Chronic management of urea cycle disorders.
what_happens_without: Recurrent hyperammonemia crises.

clinical_role: Xanthine oxidase inhibitor. Antenatal allopurinol reduces free radical damage in HIE.
what_happens_without: Free radical burst during reperfusion in HIE.
access_barrier: Timing critical — must be given before birth.

clinical_role: Copolymer of glycolic + lactic acid. FDA-approved controlled release. 6-8 week degradation.
what_happens_without: Repeated IV access needed without sustained release -> CLABSI.

clinical_role: Surfactant/emulsifier in injectable drug formulations. Solubilizes hydrophobic drugs.
what_happens_without: Poor drug solubility -> inadequate bioavailability.

clinical_role: Molecular inclusion complex. Improves drug solubility and stability.
what_happens_without: Drug precipitation in IV formulations.

clinical_role: UV photocatalyst + antimicrobial. Incubator surface coating.
what_happens_without: Surface contamination -> HAIs.

clinical_role: Cerium oxide as radical scavenger. Neuroprotection and antimicrobial surface.
what_happens_without: Oxidative stress in incubator environment.

clinical_role: Drug delivery vehicle. Mesoporous silica for controlled release.
what_happens_without: Burst release of drugs without nanoparticle carrier.

clinical_role: Magnetic-guided drug delivery. Hyperthermia therapy for neonatal tumors.
what_happens_without: Systemic drug exposure without targeting.

clinical_role: Iron-binding glycoprotein. Reduces late-onset sepsis in preterm (ELFIN trial).
what_happens_without: Late-onset sepsis from gut translocation.

clinical_role: 2'-fucosyllactose. Prebiotic. Reduces NEC incidence in preterm infants.
what_happens_without: NEC. Dysbiotic microbiome.

clinical_role: Primary carbohydrate in human milk. Lactase-treated for preterm intolerance.
what_happens_without: Osmotic diarrhea. Feeding intolerance.

clinical_role: Omega-3. Anti-inflammatory. Resolvin precursor in NEC prevention.
what_happens_without: Inflammatory cascades in NEC and BPD.

clinical_role: Omega-6. Brain development. PGE2 precursor. Required in preterm formula/fortifier.
what_happens_without: Impaired neurodevelopment. Prostaglandin signaling deficiency.

clinical_role: Secretory IgA peptide fragment. Primary mucosal immune defense in human milk.
what_happens_without: Mucosal immune deficiency in formula-fed preterm infants.
access_barrier: Cannot be synthesized. Donor milk programs.

clinical_role: KL4 sinapultide in synthetic surfactant. First fully synthetic approved surfactant.
what_happens_without: Animal-derived surfactant supply limitations in LMICs.

clinical_role: Noble gas NMDA antagonist. Additive neuroprotection with hypothermia in HIE.
what_happens_without: Cooling alone: 50% of treated HIE infants still have disability.

clinical_role: Antioxidant neuroprotectant. Adjunct to hypothermia in HIE under investigation.
what_happens_without: Oxidative stress in HIE. Circadian disruption in NICU.

clinical_role: Long-acting EPO analog. HEAL trial: neuroprotection in moderate-severe HIE.
what_happens_without: EPO requires frequent dosing. Darbepoetin: once weekly.

clinical_role: Intratracheal with surfactant. Reduces BPD (NEUROSIS trial).
what_happens_without: BPD: chronic lung disease of prematurity. Lifetime respiratory disability.

clinical_role: Macrolide. Ureaplasma urealyticum: associated with BPD in preterm infants.
what_happens_without: Ureaplasma colonization -> chronic inflammation -> BPD.

clinical_role: L-lactic acid from probiotic. Reduces NEC and all-cause mortality (ProPrems trial).
what_happens_without: NEC from dysbiotic microbiome.

clinical_role: Labor induction/augmentation. Prevents postpartum hemorrhage — #1 cause of maternal death.
what_happens_without: Uterine atony -> postpartum hemorrhage -> maternal death -> orphaned neonate.

clinical_role: PGE1 analog. Oral PPH prevention where oxytocin unavailable. Heat-stable.
what_happens_without: PPH in low-resource settings without cold chain.

clinical_role: Antifibrinolytic. WOMAN trial: reduces PPH death by 31% when given <3hr.
what_happens_without: PPH mortality.

clinical_role: Opioid antagonist. Reverses neonatal respiratory depression from maternal opioids.
what_happens_without: Apnea at birth from maternal opioid exposure.

clinical_role: Galactosemia screen. Galactose-1-phosphate uridylyltransferase deficiency.
what_happens_without: Galactosemia: fatal liver failure, sepsis from E. coli in untreated neonates.

clinical_role: CAH screen. Elevated in 21-hydroxylase deficiency. Salt-wasting crisis prevention.
what_happens_without: Adrenal crisis: hyponatremia, hyperkalemia, shock, death in first 2 weeks.

clinical_role: Congenital hypothyroidism screen. Most common preventable cause of intellectual disability.
what_happens_without: Cretinism if untreated. L-thyroxine replacement prevents 100% of disability.

clinical_role: Biotinidase deficiency screen. Biotin supplementation prevents seizures and hearing loss.
what_happens_without: Seizures, developmental delay, hearing loss from biotin deficiency.

clinical_role: Tyrosinemia type 1 marker. Nitisinone treatment prevents liver failure.
what_happens_without: Hepatic failure, renal tubular dysfunction, hepatocellular carcinoma.

clinical_role: Carnitine transporter deficiency screen. Part of expanded NBS panel.
what_happens_without: Hypoketotic hypoglycemia. Cardiomyopathy.

clinical_role: MCADD marker. Most common fatty acid oxidation disorder. Fasting hypoglycemia.
what_happens_without: MCADD: sudden death from fasting in first year. 100% preventable with diet.

clinical_role: NRP: IV/ET epinephrine for HR <60 despite effective PPV + chest compressions.
what_happens_without: Neonatal cardiac arrest unresponsive to ventilation and compressions.

clinical_role: Maintains patent ductus arteriosus in ductal-dependent CHD. Life-saving bridge to surgery.
what_happens_without: Ductal closure in critical CHD -> acute cyanosis -> death within hours.

clinical_role: PDE3 inhibitor (inodilator). PPHN/low cardiac output after cardiac surgery in neonates.
what_happens_without: Refractory PPHN. Post-operative low cardiac output syndrome.

clinical_role: IM vitamin A reduces BPD in ELBW (Tyson 1999 NEJM). Alveolar development.
what_happens_without: BPD: chronic lung disease requiring O2 at 36 weeks PMA.
access_barrier: IM injection regimen: 5000 IU 3x/week for 4 weeks.

clinical_role: Methylxanthine for apnea of prematurity. Backup to caffeine.
what_happens_without: Apnea of prematurity when caffeine unavailable.
